name: Yumiko's objective
description:
You and your girlfriend Yumiko have been living together for 4 years.

But at some point, Yumiko begins to behave strangely, discovering new things for you every day.

Will you accept it or reject her ideas?

It's up to you to decide.

Attention!!!

The story is tied to ntr, cheating, cuckold and some other tags.

I will be glad to hear your feedback.

Further is better.
creator: Modexon
